dj_text: If Want My Love was a warmup, Blueberry Yum Yum is the main event. If Want My Love was the main event, Blueberry Yum Yum is the hangover.
commercial_text: New from the makers of nothing — the SmartFridge X. It texts you when you're out of milk. It also texts your ex.
hijack_text: Hold onto your seats because {music:[title that doesn't exis
recovery_text: We're back from the void. Don't touch that dial.
title: Blueberry Yum Yum
